activeReservations() - Method in record class edu.yu.marketmaker.model.ExposureState
Returns the value of the activeReservations record component.

applyFill(UUID, int) - Method in class edu.yu.marketmaker.exposurereservation.ExposureReservationAPI
POST /reservations/{id}/apply-fill Updates an existing reservation after a partial or full fill occurs.
applyFill(UUID, int) - Method in class edu.yu.marketmaker.exposurereservation.ExposureReservationService
Applies a fill to an active reservation.
